subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 04/16] support/include: update netlink headers for all cache upcalls

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch updates the netlink headers in the nfs-utils package to match the current kernel UAPI header, adding support for new cache upcalls and commands. The changes include updating the nfsd_netlink.h header to include new enum values and attribute flags, as well as adding a new sunrpc_netlink.h header for handling auth.unix.ip and auth.unix.gid cache upcalls via netlink. This patch is part of a larger series of updates to the nfs-utils package.
